essence: Collects environmental samples and performs field tests to support monitoring and regulatory compliance.

identity.title: Environmental Sampling Technician
identity.summary: Takes water, soil, and air samples, operates field instruments, and ensures chain of custody for laboratory analysis.

salary.notes: Specialist sampling in contaminated land or marine environments can attract higher pay.

qualifications: Experience in environmental monitoring and sampling techniques
Familiarity with field instruments and chain of custody procedures
Attention to detail and health & safety awareness
Ability to work in varied outdoor conditions

lifestyle.description: Fieldwork with travel to sampling sites; requires careful documentation and adherence to protocols.

habits: Maintains chain of custody and records
